title: Silky Thai Chicken Curry
description: A savory and silky Thai dish made with chicken, lard, and a blend of spices, perfect for kids and Whole30-friendly. This curry is simmered to perfection for a delicious and comforting meal.
instructions: Heat the lard in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the chicken to the saucepan and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the fish sauce, lime juice, salt, and pepper.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh basil leaves.
